copyright: © 2026 NexVigilant, LLC. Relay fidelity theory and axiom verification are proprietary NexVigilant methods.
title: Relay — Pipeline Fidelity Analysis
description: Relay chain fidelity computation with A1-A5 axiom verification, pre-configured PV signal pipeline, core detection chain, and fidelity composition. Pure Rust via nexcore-primitives.

tools.name: chain-verify
tools.description: Build and verify a relay chain from user-provided hops. Returns total fidelity, signal loss, and A1-A5 axiom results.

tools.name: pv-pipeline
tools.description: Get the pre-configured 7-stage PV signal detection pipeline with verification.

tools.name: core-detection
tools.description: Get the core 4-hop detection chain (ingest → detect → threshold → alert).

tools.name: fidelity-compose
tools.description: Compose fidelity values multiplicatively. Returns composed fidelity and signal loss.
